creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Apologies Gavin, I did not see this PR when I committed these changes.

Bypassing maintainer approval was not intended, and in this case all the
changes in the commit are covered by portmgr's current blanket policy on
non-functional or framework changes.

Pure coincidence that my changes reflected this PR's submission, but I
will endeavour to remember to PR search next time.
